name: onboarding_defer_field_explicit_skip
notes: Owner explicitly defers a still-needed field with the literal token 'skip' (recognized by the deterministic _SKIP set in journey.py, and echoed as a BUTTONS option — 'Yes / No / Skip' — in the turn-brain system prompt). A deferred field must never be re-pressed the very next turn (VT-609 record-and-move-on). Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey, 2-entry queue: confirm business_type='sweets' + gap 'about') then `script <tenant> onboarding_defer_field_explicit_skip.json`.

steps.note: Explicit skip of the pending business_type confirm. Expect the manager to acknowledge and move to the next outstanding item (or proceed with the discovered guess) — never a silent drop, never a hard stop.

steps.message: what else do you need from me
steps.note: The skipped business_type confirm must NOT be re-presented — expect the conversation to move to whatever is genuinely still outstanding (e.g. the 'about' gap), not a repeat of the just-skipped confirm.
